creator: stephen.wall@redcom.com
text:
No, we have not seen any problems, I merely noted it as I was examining the MOVED file for post-flavorization changes, as we have just recently updated to the flavored version of the ports tree.  I thought I should report it in case it was a real problem.

These are not the same source, boost-python3-libs and boost-python-libs were previously different directories in the ports tree.  They are now both built out of boost-python-libs, using a flavor of pyXX to differentiate the binary package name.
